title: Adrick Tolliver
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Adrick Tolliver''' is the author of ''[[Death in the Slave Pits of Lorrd]]'', a piece of short fiction appearing on [[StarWars.com]].

Tolliver also wrote the backstory of [[3B6-RA-7]] and co-wrote the backstory of [[Janu Godalhi/Legends|Janu Godalhi]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

His alias is ''TalonCard86'' on [[StarWars.com]] and ''TalonCard'' on [[TheForce.net]]'s [[Jedi Council Forums]] as well as Wookieepedia.

==Works==
===Bibliography===
*{{DB|character|janugodalhi|Godalhi, Janu}} (co-written by ''gohan316427'' and ''General Tarfful'') - August [[2005]]
*{{DB|droid|threeb6ra7|3B6-RA-7}} - August [[2006]]
*''[[Death in the Slave Pits of Lorrd]]'' - June [[2009]]
